current_behavior: php-vm target exposes STDERR as a writable CLI stream and PHPT runner capture compares it through the target stderr channel
reference_behavior: run-tests.php captures target STDERR and compares it with the PHPT expectation.

current_behavior: php-vm target and local PHPT runner execute CLEAN sections and validate resulting file side effects in runner-smoke fixtures
reference_behavior: run-tests.php executes CLEAN sections and validates the resulting file side effects.

current_behavior: php-vm target receives --STDIN-- payloads from the local PHPT runner and exposes them through STDIN
reference_behavior: run-tests.php passes --STDIN-- payloads to the target process.
